title: paracroton zeylanicus
intro: Paracroton zeylanicus is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Ceylon paracroton. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its presence of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and tannins. Herbal preparations of Paracroton zeylanicus are typically made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
